description: The Australian Community Climate and Earth System Simulator (ACCESS) is a group of model versions used in Australia for all timescales from numerical weather prediction to centennial-scale climate simulations. Component models used in ACCESS vary for applications at different timescales. ACCESS-ESM is the earth system model version used for centennial-scale simulations, including an interactive carbon cycle. ACCESS-ESM comprises the UK Met Office Unified Model atmosphere, the CABLE land surface model including land biogeochemistry, the MOM ocean model with WOMBAT for ocean biogeochemistry and the CICE sea-ice model. OASIS-MCT has been used for coupling but ACCESS-ESM3 (under development) will use NUOPC.
